summary.zh: 修复会话列表、附件、斜杠命令和工作台设置里几处会误导或丢状态的问题；会话元数据异常时会明确提示待恢复，而不再看起来像「没有会话」。
summary.en: Fixes several misleading or state-losing issues in the session list, attachments, slash commands, and workbench settings. When session metadata is unhealthy, the app now shows a recovery notice instead of an empty session list.

title.zh: 会话元数据异常时显示恢复提示
title.en: Recovery notice when session metadata is unhealthy

summary.zh: 会话元数据损坏或被隔离时，侧边栏会提示「部分会话待恢复」，并继续显示仍可用的会话，而不再误显示成空列表。
summary.en: When session metadata is corrupted or quarantined, the sidebar shows that some sessions need recovery and keeps healthy sessions visible, instead of looking empty.

sources.title: fix(session): surface metadata recovery state instead of a misleading empty session list

title.zh: 会话加载竞态不再丢掉附件
title.en: Session load races no longer drop attachments

summary.zh: 快速切换或加载会话时，附件与 SessionFile 登记不再因竞态被清掉。
summary.en: Attachments and SessionFile registry entries no longer disappear due to a race while loading or switching sessions.

sources.title: fix(session): 会话加载竞态不再丢弃 SessionFile registry (#2188)
SessionFile registry dropped during session load race

title.zh: 斜杠补全发送规范命令文本
title.en: Slash completion sends canonical command text

summary.zh: 从补全菜单选中斜杠命令后，发送的是规范命令文本，而不是编辑器里未整理的裸文本。
summary.en: Choosing a slash command from the completion menu now sends the canonical command text instead of the raw editor text.

sources.title: fix(slash): 补全菜单选择后发送 canonical 命令而非编辑器裸文本 (#2209)
Slash completion sent raw editor text

title.zh: 工作台按 Agent 保存后立即刷新

summary.zh: 工作台里按 Agent 保存配置后会立刻刷新快照，切回该 Agent 不再看到旧值。
summary.en: Workbench per-agent saves now refresh the config snapshot immediately, so switching back no longer shows stale values.

sources.title: fix(settings): 工作台 per-agent 保存后同步刷新配置快照，切回不再显示旧值 (#2192)
Workbench per-agent config showed stale values after save

title.zh: 记忆后台任务不再挡住会话重试
title.en: Background memory jobs no longer block session retry

summary.zh: 后台正在做记忆摘要或编译时，会话重试不再被误报为忙碌而失败。
summary.en: Session retry no longer fails as busy while background memory summary or compile jobs are running.

sources.title: fix(memory): stop blocking session retry while background memory jobs run
